scene.message: Mark: Hey, Kido!{nl} You still alive?!{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: Ngh...{wait_fr:60}{nl} Where's that bastard...?{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{wait_fr:60}Yeah, well.{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: .........{wait_fr:88}Dammit!{nl} I am Reiji Kido!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: You okay, Reiji?{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{wait_fr:60}Worry about{nl} yourself, not me.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Damn right.{waitkey}{ret}
